PK field; duplicate check on CREATE via declarantDA:Exists
Set to CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE by BS before validation

database.description: CREATE blocked if declarantDA:Exists returns true

issues.description: dsDeclarant.i include file missing from workspace — field inventory incomplete
N+1 FetchObject calls inside FOR EACH ttDeclarant on UPDATE and DELETE
Duplicated transaction start/commit/rollback/catch boilerplate across Create, Update, Delete
IsValid early return uses return valMsgs:IsEmpty() when not empty — obfuscated logic
IsValidForDelete has no validations — potential referential integrity gap
ReadOnlyFields + CountryCode string concatenation may duplicate CountryCode entry
find first ttInitialDeclarant without AVAILABLE check before CopyBufferReplaceUnknowns in Create
datasetHandle from SiteService:FetchList not explicitly deleted
Five sequential GetFieldDescription calls per row in FetchObject
LeaveAsUnknownList hard-codes custom date field names

recommendations.description: Add dsDeclarant.i to analysis scope for complete field-level report
Extract private RunInTransaction method in DeclarantBS to DRY transaction handling
Implement batch fetch for multi-row UPDATE/DELETE operations
Add referential integrity checks to IsValidForDelete (site usage, open declarations)
Replace return valMsgs:IsEmpty() with explicit return false in IsValid metadata failure path
Add AVAILABLE guard after find first ttInitialDeclarant in Create
